title: Instrument d'adhésion

pages.text:
RL/MFA/1010/2-5/'12

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Liberia presents its compliments to the

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France, and has the honour to inform the latler that the Covernment of the Republic of Liberia has received and examined the provisions of the

International Agreement and of the Organic Statutes of 25 January 1924 of the Office

International de Epizooties (QIE).

In view of the above, the Ciovernment of the Republic of Liberia has decided to become i member of the World Organization for Animal Health and agrees to participate in the working costs of the Office under the conditions stated, especially with regards to Amicle 3 of the

International Agreement and Aricle 11 of the Internal statutes, and that the six (6) contribution category level of EUR 17,250 (EURO Seventeen Thousand Two Hundred Fifty) has been selected by the Covernment of Liberia as its Membership Contribution.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs is pleased to further inform that Mrs. Seklau Wiles, Director in the National Livestock Bureau of'the Ministry of Agriculture is the official Delegato of Libera to the OIE. Attached is the OLE membership request template.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Liberia avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

MO

ALAPRIE 36;2012

巛

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France 37, quai d'Orsay 75351 Paris

France

Attention:

Direction Gènèrale des affaires politiques et de Sècuritè :% Direction des Nations Unis et des Organisations Internationales
